issues.title: Enemy dealt 22 dmg (88% of 25 HP) on floor 3
issues.description: On floor 3, encounter 2, turn 16 (seq 446), the enemy dealt 22 damage which is 88% of the player's 25 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.
issues.suggestedFix: Cap single-hit enemy damage to 50% of player current HP or add damage-reduction mechanics.

issues.title: 3 consecutive easy encounters (floors 1-1)
issues.description: 3 consecutive encounters where player ended with >90 HP remaining. Encounters: F1E0:94HP, F1E1:97HP, F1E2:100HP. The game may not be challenging enough in this stretch.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider scaling enemy HP or damage for this difficulty/profile combination.

issues.title: 4 consecutive easy encounters (floors 1-2)
issues.description: 4 consecutive encounters where player ended with >90 HP remaining. Encounters: F1E0:94HP, F1E1:97HP, F1E2:100HP, F2E0:91HP. The game may not be challenging enough in this stretch.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider scaling enemy HP or damage for this difficulty/profile combination.

issues.title: 5 consecutive easy encounters (floors 1-2)
issues.description: 5 consecutive encounters where player ended with >90 HP remaining. Encounters: F1E0:94HP, F1E1:97HP, F1E2:100HP, F2E0:91HP, F2E1:99HP. The game may not be challenging enough in this stretch.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider scaling enemy HP or damage for this difficulty/profile combination.

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 3, encounter 2 (shadow_hydra)
issues.description: Player was defeated on floor 3, encounter 2 against shadow_hydra (boss). Accuracy was 71% with 17 turns played. Early defeat suggests difficulty may be too high for this profile.
issues.suggestedFix: Reduce early floor enemy HP/damage or activate canary system earlier for struggling profiles.

issues.title: Player defeated despite 68% accuracy
issues.description: Player was defeated with an overall accuracy of 68%, well above the 60% threshold. This suggests the player knew the material but the game's damage/healing balance is too punishing. Dying despite knowledge mastery feels unfair.
reproductionSteps: Review enemy damage scaling vs. healing/shield availability
issues.suggestedFix: Reduce enemy damage or increase healing for players above 60% accuracy (canary system integration).

issues.title: Floor 2 enc 0: 16 turns vs prev floor avg 5.0
issues.description: Encounter 0 on floor 2 took 16 turns to resolve, which is more than 2x the previous floor's average of 5.0 turns. This indicates a sharp difficulty spike. Enemy: crystal_golem (common).

issues.title: Floor 2 enc 2: 25 turns vs prev floor avg 5.0
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 2 took 25 turns to resolve, which is more than 2x the previous floor's average of 5.0 turns. This indicates a sharp difficulty spike. Enemy: stone_sentinel (mini_boss).

issues.title: HP crashed from 100 to 3 in floor 3 encounter 2
issues.description: During floor 3, encounter 2, player HP dropped from 100 to 3. Going from >70 to <20 in one encounter feels punishing and unfun.

issues.title: Card type "wild" was never played during the entire run
issues.description: The card type "wild" had 0 plays across the entire run (264 total cards played). This may indicate the type is not appearing in decks, not being offered, or players are avoiding it.
reproductionSteps: Check deck composition — does "wild" appear in the card pool?
